math brute force *800
A. Watermelon Division
time limit per test
1 second
memory limit per test
64 megabytes
input
standard input
output
standard output

One hot summer day Pete and his friend Billy decided to buy a watermelon weighing $$$w$$$ kilos. They want to divide it into two parts, each weighing an even number of kilos.

Can they do it?

Input

The first line contains an integer $$$w$$$ ($$$1 \le w \le 100$$$) — the weight of the watermelon.

Output

Print YES if they can divide it, and NO otherwise.

Examples
Input
8
Output
YES
Input
5
Output
NO
Note

For $$$w = 8$$$ the parts can weigh $$$2$$$ and $$$6$$$ kilos.
